name: ytbot
description: WhatsApp bot that extracts direct YouTube audio links via yt-dlp

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/bot.js && node --check src/handlers/messages.js && node --check src/services/ytdlp.js && node --check src/utils/url.js && node --check src/utils/message.js && node --check src/config/index.js
